name: Veal Casserole
recipeIngredient: flour seasoned with herbs (thyme, oregano, salt, pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust veal with seasoned flour.
2. Brown well in butter.
3. Add consomme, mushroom soup, wine, Worcestershire sauce, and mushrooms.
4. Simmer until meat is tender (About two hours).
5. Add 2 cups of thin egg noodles until soft. (about 20 minutes).
Makes: 6 servings
